prompt.asset_type: Voxa Cue marketing website hero image
prompt.primary_request: Create a premium editorial product photograph of the exact Voxa Cue haptic wristband shown in the reference image. Preserve its slim graphite capsule, dark silicone loop, subtle teal indicator window, and refined copper haptic detail. Show one hero band and one secondary band resting naturally on a sculpted warm ivory stone plinth.

input_images.invariants: preserve the industrial graphite wearable form, dark strap, teal indicator, copper accent, proportions, and restraint

prompt.scene_backdrop: quiet architectural studio with softly curved warm ivory plaster planes and a distant deep graphite wall
prompt.subject: Voxa Cue wearable, fully visible, physically plausible, product-forward
prompt.style_medium: photorealistic luxury consumer technology campaign photography, tactile editorial realism
prompt.composition_framing: wide landscape hero composition, wearable large on the right half, substantial clean negative space on the left for website headline, slight low three-quarter camera angle, 85mm lens feel
prompt.lighting_mood: soft directional morning light, precise edge highlights, controlled low-contrast shadows, calm and assured
prompt.materials_textures: satin graphite metal, matte silicone, brushed copper, fine mineral plaster grain, realistic contact shadows

prompt.asset_type: Voxa Cue marketing website lifestyle feature image
prompt.primary_request: Create a candid editorial photograph of a confident young presenter speaking to a small, attentive audience in a bright modern studio. They are wearing the exact slim graphite Voxa Cue haptic wristband from the references on the wrist of their natural gesturing hand. A phone rests unobtrusively face-up on a side table several feet away, listening during the talk. The presenter is focused on the audience, never looking at a screen.

input_images.invariants: preserve graphite capsule, dark silicone strap, subtle teal window, compact proportions

input_images.role: product material and campaign lighting reference
input_images.invariants: match tactile graphite, warm ivory, teal, and copper visual language

prompt.asset_type: Voxa Cue marketing website engineering detail
prompt.primary_request: Create a premium, physically believable exploded engineering product photograph of the exact slim Voxa Cue haptic wristband from the references. Show the wearable capsule separated into five precise layers along one shallow diagonal axis: satin graphite top enclosure with the small teal indicator aperture, a thin dark structural frame, a compact green microcontroller board with realistic tiny components but no readable markings, one copper-toned circular linear resonant haptic actuator, and a graphite rear shell attached to the dark silicone wrist loop. Use subtle thin teal signal traces between the board and actuator to imply the haptic command path. Keep every component aligned, compact, restrained, and plausibly manufacturable.

input_images.role: wearable geometry and component language reference
input_images.invariants: preserve slim rounded graphite capsule, dark strap, teal indicator, copper haptic accent, and realistic proportions

input_images.role: campaign material, light, and palette reference
input_images.invariants: match the quiet ivory studio, satin graphite, restrained teal, and tactile copper treatment

prompt.composition_framing: wide landscape 3:2 composition, exploded wearable centered slightly right, parts separated by only a few centimeters, shallow three-quarter top view, full assembly visible, generous clean margins
prompt.lighting_mood: soft overhead studio light, precise edge highlights, restrained contact shadows under each floating layer, calm and technical
prompt.materials_textures: satin anodized graphite, matte silicone, brushed copper actuator, realistic fiberglass circuit board, tiny metal contacts, fine plaster grain
constraints: components remain aligned and mechanically plausible
